scripts.check:aliases: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const src=fs.readFileSync('src/app.js','utf8'); const aliasPattern=/\bvar\s+\w+\s*=\s*AppHtml\.\w+\s*(?:;|$)/m; if (aliasPattern.test(src)) { console.error('Alias check failed: found AppHtml helper alias assignment in src/app.js'); process.exit(1); } console.log('Alias check passed.');"
scripts.dev: npm run build && npx wrangler dev
scripts.start: npm run build && npx wrangler dev
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
